storyInfo: The group splits up. Sakiko is the first to find Iris's pen pal, Ann, and observes firsthand her miserable life. She plays a lullaby for Ann in her last moments of childhood. Iris gives Sakiko a necklace in gratitude. Sakiko puts on the necklace, and finds herself in a massive castle.

attributes.content: <p=2>9:37 P.M.</> <p=1>A Remote Victorian Town</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: We're four whole hours behind schedule...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: We don't have much time left until midnight...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: The streets are deserted. We're not finding a map in a place like this either... This is a rotten turn.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: We should split up. We have our communicators. If anyone finds anything, page the rest.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Not a bad idea...
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Wait, okay, that works for us, but...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: You don't have any solo experience, Sakiko. I can't let you go alone.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Now is hardly the time for that, is it?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You heard what she wrote. 'This will be my final letter.'
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In the worst-case scenario, she's...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But...!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: ...Vigna. I'll be fine.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: By Miss Whislash's account, I'm ready to operate in a squad based on my current abilities, remember?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Takes out communicator) And I'll call at the first sign of trouble. Is that satisfactory?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Good! And don't forget us!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: ...Fine. Just be careful, yeah?
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I will. Miss Iris, what's her name and address?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Her name is Ann... address, 33 Garden Street.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Acknowledged. We'll start from this crossroad. Split up and let's begin!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: *pant* *pant* How can these streets be so complicated?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Is someone selling... flowers there?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
Sakiko Togawa
attributes.content: Why would someone be selling flowers at this hour...?

attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
attributes.content: No, no matter. I need a lead!
Excuse me—!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Excuse me, do you know where Garden Street is?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You're on it. Would you like a flower, Miss?
attributes.name: Florist Lady

attributes.content: No. No, thank you... Would you happen to know which way number 33 is?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Look up, and follow the setting sun towards the west. Last house at the end of the street, that's number 33.
attributes.name: Florist Lady

attributes.content: Madam, it's already night...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Oh, that's why I didn't hear any footsteps in the streets... Silly me, doddering about. Suppose it's time I went home.
attributes.name: Florist Lady

attributes.content: Is your sight...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Don't you worry about me. Got somewhere to go, don't you? Better go.
attributes.name: Florist Lady

attributes.content: The nights are dark here. Now don't you get lost again.
attributes.name: Florist Lady

attributes.content: Thank you... you be safe, too.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: <p=1>33 Garden Street</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Towards the west... This is the place she meant, then.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: The old door creaks as Sakiko pushes it open.
Ugh... it reeks of alcohol in here!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: The ground is covered in muddy shoeprints. In the corner, there stands a ragged man.
He looks all around, then starts going through bottles tidily tucked away in the corner, picking up each one.
Empty...
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: Empty...
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: ...All empty!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: Anna! Anna!!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: Where the hell are you?!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: *whimper* Is that it? You're abandoning me, running away, JUST LIKE SHE DID?!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: Gh... Anna... Anna...
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: I won't drink anymore! I swear! Starting today, I'll do my best!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: The man collapses to his knees in agony, then promptly screams in pain.
His palm is pierced by a shard of the bottle he broke.
A-Anna...! There's blood... on the floor... I'm bleeding!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: I'm dying! Come back, Anna! I'm dying!!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: Anna... you're back?
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: I'm not Anna.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You are... you are!
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: It's me! Don't you remember me?
attributes.name: Drunken Man

attributes.content: The man makes to crawl towards Sakiko, but lets out another scream.
Inexplicably, a wave of lamentation washes through Sakiko.
She places her hand on the battered door frame—
I—
attributes.name: Ragged Girl

attributes.content: Let's go.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: So the story you never published... that was an account of what really happened to you?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: I do love fairytales. Back when Mum was still around, she bought me heaps and heaps of storybooks.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: We were happy back then. Me, and Mum... and Dad.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: But the happiness left with Mum.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: I tried to write about all I'd gone through, show it to others, but nobody wants to read about oppression and despair.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: So I turned every sentence on its head. I let them become the most beautiful fairytales of all.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: ...But I stopped reading fairytales long ago.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: Anna...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Trembles)
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: P-Please don't call me by that name...
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: ...I'm sorry. I didn't mean to hurt you.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Don't worry. You've already been much kinder to me than anyone else.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: There's Iris, actually. She's worried about you.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You know Iris?
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: I do. I came with her to find you. I just gave her a call, and she's right on her way.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris...
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: You don't want to see her?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I know how busy she is. Every day, she has so much to take care of...
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: You're a very important friend to her.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You know... I was up on a high place today. And I kept standing up, and looking down...
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: But I had all the letters she wrote to me in my pocket. I kept every last one. And I just kept holding onto them.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: She told me to keep living. That the sweet dreams of my fairytales would come about someday.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: I don't know if I should trust myself, or trust her...
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: You can absolutely trust her.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: She's a real fairy, after all.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Fairy?
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: You'll understand as soon as she's here. She says before you become an adult—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko looks up at the clock.
It's an antique one, hung high on the wall, and the hour and minute hands are slowly converging upon each other.
Dammit...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: Iris was saying, before you become an adult...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You mean, before my birthday? Iris wants to celebrate my birthday?
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: Yes, and we're running out of time...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: That's alright, I haven't celebrated my birthday in so long anyway.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: I'm not a child anymore. When you're grown up, you don't need celebration.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: Sakiko's gaze flits around, and something catches her eye.
Ann. How about I give you your birthday's blessings?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Huh?
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: ...Okay.
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: It is a piano.
The moon shines upon it, as though it was put there just for tonight.
Even if Iris's sweet dream doesn't make it in time, Sakiko wants to do something for Ann.
In your last moments before you become a grown-up, an adult... allow me to play you a lullaby as a present.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Got it!
attributes.name: Ann

attributes.content: Sakiko paces up the steps. Ann sits below.
Their hearts beat. The clock ticks. The sounds gradually come into focus between them.
Thump, thump.
Tick, tock.
Sakiko's fingers weave through keys of black and white.
The notes leap with the passage of time, giving sincerest blessings to the miracle of the girl's birth.
Thank you for coming into this land.
May the future hold happiness and joy for you.
May the child live forever in your heart.
As the final note settles, a church bell rings.
Happy birthday, Ann...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko turns to look at the girl, only to find she has fallen asleep at the table, her face the picture of peaceful slumber.
Happy birthday, Ann.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Bena's in the church, waiting for Ann to wake up. Let's take a little stroll outside, shall we?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Thank goodness you made it in the end.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Mm, it was close. Thank goodness indeed.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: What kind of dream did you... spin for her?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: A room of pure white, so clean it could not be real.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: And in there, first things first, I inquired if she'd be willing to enter the dreamland I'd spun for her.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: You are quite the noble lady, aren't you?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Please do not take what Bena said at face value...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: 'You must have the child's permission before you enter their dreamland.'
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: It's a necessary procedure as ordained by the Castle of Dreams.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I see—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Did you talk about anything else with her, after that?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In her dream, I told her how truly beautiful her words were, and that I hope she can continue to write.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Whatever the style, whatever the story. It hardly has to be a fairytale, even.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Yes. That's what I wanted to tell her too.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Before her eyes, I unveiled each and every character she'd penned.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Mr. Decaytooth who loves to eat fruit, Miss Dolly who walks on her hands... And they all had a tea party together.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: How wonderful. If only Ann could stay in that dream forever...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Dreams are not for wallowing in.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: No matter how sweet the dream, one has to wake up in the end.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Even if reality is callous and chaotic?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You and Bena have such powerful Originium Arts...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko, you misunderstand the power of fairytales and the Castle of Dreams. In the face of reality, what we can accomplish is so very limited.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: It is but one thing. We nestle a seed deep in the depths of a child's heart.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Likely, it is what they considered the most important event, or thing, to them as children.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: It usually lies quietly deep within. But at crucial moments—when people are at their weakest—it gives them strength.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: ...Am I being a little too weighty, here?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: No. I saw the conviction in your eyes as you spoke.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I'm sure the dream you spun for Ann will stay with her, and give her the courage to live in the days to come.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Mm. I believe so too, though my reason is a little different.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Before I spun her dream, I found in her heart a tiny seed.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Sweet dreams from the Castle are far from the only way to plant the seeds of faith—
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: It's all thanks to you, Sakiko.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Yeah, your piano was amazing!
I told you you'd be a killer musician. You need to get on stage at Rhodes Island's concerts!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Oh please, Vigna, spare me...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: As Vigna and Sakiko mock-fight, Iris draws an item out of a box.
You mentioned having strange dreams, Sakiko?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Carry this necklace with you, and the nightmares should lessen.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Are you... sure I should have this?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Just take it, honestly. It's nothing valuable. A little Arts-enchanted, that's all.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Hey—gimme one too!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Do you also have nightmares?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I mean... probably maybe? I don't remember!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: No. I can tell you've been a perfectly sound sleeper all your life.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Ughh—man, it's no fun dealing with you fairies! Nothing's secret from you.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: As her colleagues chat, Sakiko carefully puts the necklace on.
She feels a gentle coolness at her neck, that then spreads through her entire body.
Oh, how beautiful...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris, Vigna, look—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Nobody is there.
Vigna?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Iris?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko looks around her.
Nobody is there.
Where... Hello?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko begins to make for the church she just left, every step more urgent than the last.
Bena!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Ann!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What...? Why am I back at Rhodes Island?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Miss Sakiko?
attributes.name: Perplexed Operator

attributes.content: Are you alright?
attributes.name: Perplexed Operator

attributes.content: Are—are you—alright?
(Turns around)—!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: H-Hello?
It's like how everything used to be... It's almost like we're dreaming.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Ugh... a dream?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko? Sakiko!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Mm... hmm?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Time to get up, sleepyhead! It's a beautiful day.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: It's so cold...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: My head hurts...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Saki... ko.
Sa—ki—ko!
Mmgh... where am I?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: She is inside a massive castle.
Looking up at the sky through the large window, she saw twin moons floating in the night sky.
The cold has cleared up her mind. She looks around her.
(Perplexed chirping)
W-What kind of creatures are these?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Oh my, did someone come to?
The crisp sound of heels striking the ground rings out from the shadows.
And thereupon a figure emerges, and slowly draws close to Sakiko.
Clack, clack.
Humph! How boring.
